name: Marinated Broccoli Chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine vinegar, olive oil, dillweed, and garlic in a medium bowl. Stir well with a wire whisk.
2. Set aside.
3. Trim large leaves from broccoli.
4. Remove flowerets and reserve for another use.
5. Remove tough ends of the lower stalks and discard.
6. Wash remaining stalks and cut diagonally into 1/2-inch slices.
7. Add 2 cups broccoli slices to the vinegar mixture.
8. Toss gently to coat.
9. Reserve any remaining slices for another use.
10. Cover and chill coated broccoli slices for 3 hours.
11. To serve, place broccoli on a cabbage-lined serving plate.
12. Garnish with dill and pimiento.
(1.8g fat, 0g cholesterol)
